'''âh-m-p''' ('''kahamap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monologuise|monologuise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monologuise|monologuise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| kahamap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihamap|thihamap]] || [[word:jihamap|jihamap]] || [[word:shihamap|shihamap]] || [[word:kihamap|kihamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhamap|thuthuhamap]] || [[word:jujuhamap|jujuhamap]] || [[word:shushuhamap|shushuhamap]] || [[word:kukuhamap|kukuhamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhamap|thuhamap]] || [[word:juhamap|juhamap]] || [[word:shuhamap|shuhamap]] || [[word:kuhamap|kuhamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhamap|thuhamap]] || [[word:juhamap|juhamap]] || [[word:shuhamap|shuhamap]] || [[word:kuhamap|kuhamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehamap|thehamap]] || [[word:jehamap|jehamap]] || [[word:shehamap|shehamap]] || [[word:kehamap|kehamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohamap|thothohamap]] || [[word:jojohamap|jojohamap]] || [[word:shoshohamap|shoshohamap]] || [[word:kokohamap|kokohamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohamap|thohamap]] || [[word:johamap|johamap]] || [[word:shohamap|shohamap]] || [[word:kohamap|kohamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohamap|thohamap]] || [[word:johamap|johamap]] || [[word:shohamap|shohamap]] || [[word:kohamap|kohamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚhamap|thĂŚhamap]] || [[word:jĂŚhamap|jĂŚhamap]] || [[word:shĂŚhamap|shĂŚhamap]] || [[word:kĂŚhamap|kĂŚhamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahamap|thathahamap]] || [[word:jajahamap|jajahamap]] || [[word:shashahamap|shashahamap]] || [[word:kakahamap|kakahamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahamap|thahamap]] || [[word:jahamap|jahamap]] || [[word:shahamap|shahamap]] || [[word:kahamap|kahamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahamap|thahamap]] || [[word:jahamap|jahamap]] || [[word:shahamap|shahamap]] || [[word:kahamap|kahamap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahamap|shahamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahamap|goshahamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahamap|gokishahamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahamapnĂź|shahamapnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahamapnknĂź|goshahamapnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamapnĂź|gokishahamapnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahamapshĂŤ|shahamapshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahamapnkshĂŤ|goshahamapnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahamapshĂŤ|gokishahamapshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamapro|shahamapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamapnkro|goshahamapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamapro|gokishahamapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamapmu|shahamapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamapnkmu|goshahamapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamapmu|gokishahamapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahamapsher|shahamapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahamapnksher|goshahamapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahamapsher|gokishahamapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahamapng|shahamapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahamapnkng|goshahamapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahamapng|gokishahamapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahamapya|shahamapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahamapnkya|goshahamapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahamapya|gokishahamapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahamapyam|shahamapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahamapnkyam|goshahamapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahamapyam|gokishahamapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamapnĂźshĂŤ|shahamapnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamapnknĂźshĂŤ|goshahamapnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamapnĂźshĂŤ|gokishahamapnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamapnĂźro|shahamapnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamapnknĂźro|goshahamapnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamapnĂźro|gokishahamapnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamapnĂźmu|shahamapnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamapnknĂźmu|goshahamapnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamapnĂźmu|gokishahamapnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamapshĂŤnĂź|shahamapshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamapnkshĂŤnĂź|goshahamapnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamapshĂŤnĂź|gokishahamapshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamapshĂŤro|shahamapshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamapnkshĂŤro|goshahamapnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamapshĂŤro|gokishahamapshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamapshĂŤmu|shahamapshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamapnkshĂŤmu|goshahamapnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamapshĂŤmu|gokishahamapshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamapronĂź|shahamapronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamapnkronĂź|goshahamapnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamapronĂź|gokishahamapronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamaproshĂŤ|shahamaproshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamapnkroshĂŤ|goshahamapnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamaproshĂŤ|gokishahamaproshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamapromu|shahamapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamapnkromu|goshahamapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamapromu|gokishahamapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamapmunĂź|shahamapmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamapnkmunĂź|goshahamapnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamapmunĂź|gokishahamapmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamapmushĂŤ|shahamapmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamapnkmushĂŤ|goshahamapnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamapmushĂŤ|gokishahamapmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamapmuro|shahamapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamapnkmuro|goshahamapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamapmuro|gokishahamapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
